title: rutaea heterophylla
intro: Rutaea heterophylla, also known as the 'Rutaea tree', is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of limonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rutaea heterophylla include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Rutaea heterophylla can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
